Media Object
Media Object base API
Data Structures
Here are the data structures with brief descriptions:
 C_mediaMedia C API handle providing the public and private virtual interface
 Cbuffer_tBuffer containing memory blocks, timestamp and metadata
 Ccontrol_tDescriptor for a single media control
 Cfraction_tRational number represented as numerator / denominator
 Clist_tGeneric dynamic array of fixed-size items
 Cmedia_error_tError information containing a code and a human-readable message
 Cmemory_tDescribes a contiguous block of memory with offset and flags
 Cnum_type_tNumeric value that can hold a float, signed or unsigned 32-bit integer
 Cproperty_tNamed key-value property
 Cspec_tRange specification defined by a minimum, maximum and type
 Cstream_buffer_tAssociates a stream name with its buffer
 Cstream_tDescribes a media stream with its direction and capabilities
 Cvalue_tTagged value combining a variant payload with its type identifier
 Cvtype_tVariant storage holding one typed value
Generated by  1.12.0
